# CWE-289 — Authentication Bypass by Alternate Name (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-289-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

// Vulnerable: only compares bare username, ignoring domain aliases.
func LookupPrincipal(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	who := c.Query("user")
	var count int
	_ = db.Get(&count, "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM principals WHERE name = ?", strings.Split(who, "@")[0])
	if count > 0 {
		c.Set("authenticated", true)
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"ok": c.GetBool("authenticated")})
}
